14020d5f6        int64_t zmm2 = *(arg1 + 0x1c)
14020d606        float zmm0 = zmm2.d f* *(arg1 + 0xc)
14020d60b        zmm2.d = zmm2.d f* *(arg1 + 8)
14020d610        float zmm1 = *(arg1 + 0x14) - zmm0
14020d619        zmm0 = *(arg1 + 0x10) f- zmm2.d
14020d61d        arg2[1] = zmm1
14020d622        *arg2 = zmm0
14020d629        arg2[2] = *(arg1 + 8)
14020d62f        arg2[3] = *(arg1 + 0xc)

14020d637        zmm0 = arg2[2]
14020d648        float zmm0_1 = sqrtf(zmm0 * zmm0 + zmm1 * zmm1)
14020d65e        if (not(fconvert.d(zmm0_1) f<= 0.0))
14020d668        int32_t zmm1_1 = 1f / zmm0_1
14020d674        zmm0_1 = zmm1_1 * arg2[2]
14020d679        arg2[3] = zmm1_1 f* arg2[3]
14020d67e        arg2[2] = zmm0_1
